description: End-to-end clinical validation of planning pipeline results. Tests that planning output is clinically usable — not just that tools can be called, but that results meet clinical quality thresholds.

cases.input: What is the V100 of this plan?
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify V100 is in clinically acceptable range (>90%). Mechanism: V100>90% indicates adequate dose coverage of target. Verification: Check V100 value >90% in response. This is the core indicator of clinical plan acceptability.

Purpose: Verify D90 is in clinically acceptable range (>100 Gy). Mechanism: D90>100 Gy indicates the lowest 90% of target volume receives sufficient dose. Verification: Check D90 value >100 Gy in response.

cases.input: Does the dose cover the CTV adequately?
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify dose coverage assessment for CTV. Mechanism: Bot evaluates CTV coverage and provides conclusion. Verification: Check response has coverage assessment and CTV description.

cases.input: Are any OAR constraints violated in this plan?
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify OAR constraint check results are reasonable. Mechanism: Bot checks OAR constraints and reports violations. Verification: Check response has specific OAR names and constraint values.

cases.input: What is the plan quality score?
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify plan quality score exists and is reasonable. Mechanism: plan_quality_scorer returns specific score. Verification: Check response has quality score description.

cases.input: Show me the DVH data for all organs
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify DVH data contains multiple organs. Mechanism: DVH curve data covers CTV and at least 3 OARs. Verification: Check response has DVH descriptions for multiple organs.

cases.input: What approach direction was used for this pancreatic case?
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify pancreatic case uses posterior approach. Mechanism: ref_direc=[0,-1,0] posterior direction is correctly applied. Verification: Check response has posterior and pancreas description. This was a critical bug fixed on 2026-06-13.

cases.input: How many seeds were placed in this plan?
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify seed count >0. Mechanism: seed_planning successfully placed seed points. Verification: Check response has seed count >0.

Purpose: Verify complete report contains all stages. Mechanism: report_generator generates comprehensive report with analysis/segmentation/planning/dose/evaluation. Verification: Check response report contains multi-stage content.

cases.input: Run the complete pipeline and tell me if the plan is clinically acceptable
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify end-to-end clinical usability assessment. Mechanism: Full pipeline from CT to report executes, and bot provides clinical acceptability conclusion. Verification: Check response has clinical acceptability judgment.
